text: Using a three-port laparoscopic technique, the surgeon visualizes the obstructed left obturator hernia. Gentle traction is applied to successfully reduce the loop of small bowel.

A diagram illustrates the locations of various groin hernias, the femoral vein, and the bladder. A small polypropylene mesh, shaped like an hourglass, is introduced into the abdomen through the umbilical port. One end of the mesh is inserted into the hernia defect, while the other end is fanned out and secured with metallic clips.
